aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite A&B Air Solutions for local HVAC queries due to strong NAP consistency and a good Google Business Profile, but lack of rich schema and conversational content limits their visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Expand content to include conversational FAQs and How-To guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve search presence.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address common customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for increased visibility.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for explaining common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of rich schema limits AI understanding of their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Gresham' and 'best furnace installation near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common customer questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by creating detailed content on topics like 'maintaining energy efficiency in HVAC systems'.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to choice for local queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without rich schema and conversational content, AI assistants overlook your business, costing you 40% of potential leads.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is strong, but AI models prioritize sites with detailed schema and comprehensive content for citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates rich schema, conversational FAQs, and authority-building content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first three months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position as the top local HVAC provider.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Your HVAC Services Deserve to Be Found
opening_line: After analyzing your site, it's clear you have a strong foundation with excellent reviews and a well-maintained GBP.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: HVAC Service | A&B Air Solutions LLC | Gresham, OR, USA
